description_long: This house complex features multiple interconnected structures with pitched, dark-colored roofs and light exterior walls. The main building is flanked by two wings, each with its own roof, and a central driveway leading to a large garage with double doors. A cylindrical water tank is positioned near the main structure, and a separate rectangular platform with a small antenna or flagpole sits apart from the main house. Windows are distributed across the facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually, contributing to an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. The entryway is marked by a small porch with steps, and the overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential property with ample outdoor space.
description: A multi-winged house with pitched roofs, a large garage, a water tank, and a separate platform, featuring light walls and dark roofs with asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central driveway, and the garage with double doors; the water tank and separate platform are visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left wing of the house, the connecting walkway, and the garage; the water tank is more prominent from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades of the house wings, the water tank in the foreground, and the separate platform to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear of the garage, the back of the main house, and the platform with antenna/flagpole in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Small porch with steps, single main door, minimal overhang, no columns
